overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the rain-soaked Eden Plaza district. The player moves from an elevated walkway overlooking a sunken plaza with wrecked vehicles, past civilians and Tyger Claws gang members, through a street lined with destroyed cars, and into a narrow neon-lit corridor. The scene is dominated by intense pink neon lighting and wet reflective surfaces in a dystopian cyberpunk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking sunken plaza with neon advertisements

events.description: begins walking along the elevated railing overlooking the plaza
panning right to view the sunken plaza filled with wrecked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway and looking down at the sunken plaza with wrecked vehicles

lower level plaza filled with destroyed vehicles and debris
tall palm trees growing along the edge of the walkway
metal and concrete safety railing along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from an elevated walkway overlooking a sunken plaza. The Eden Plaza sign glows on the left while a massive pink neon-lit building dominates the right side. The camera moves along the railing, looking down at the wrecked vehicles in the pit below. The atmosphere is damp and overcast with wet reflective surfaces.

events.description: turning from the pit overlook to face the pedestrian walkway with bystanders
two Tyger Claws gang members in red armor walk toward and past the camera
passing close by a group of three civilians conversing near the railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper walkway, passing Tyger Claws gang members and a group of conversing civilians

notable_agents.action: Tyger Claws gang member in red armor and yellow mask walking toward and past the camera
group of three civilians standing and conversing near the railing

entered.detail: purple neon 'LG' sign visible on a distant building
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning the background

segments.scene_description: The camera turns from the pit to face the walkway where several civilians are gathered. Two Tyger Claws gang members in distinctive red armor walk past the camera. The group of three civilians stands near the railing conversing as the camera passes them. The LG neon sign and an overpass structure become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level with wrecked vehicles and debris

events.description: descending from upper walkway to street level with wrecked cars
passing a wrecked van with a person standing beside it on the left

agents.ego_description: walking down the street past rows of wrecked and abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: person standing next to a wrecked van on the left side of the path

entered.detail: damaged dark-colored van with open doors on the left side
red vehicle flipped on its side among other debris
scattered wreckage and abandoned car parts covering the ground

segments.scene_description: Moving to street level, the camera walks past rows of wrecked vehicles including a van with a person standing beside it. The pink neon building looms closer on the left. The ground is littered with debris and abandoned cars. The overpass structure becomes more prominent in the center of the view.

events.description: entering the narrow walkway between the pink neon buildings
turning right to look down at the lower debris-filled area

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow neon-lit corridor toward the Eden Plaza entrance, then glancing down at a lower level

entered.detail: confined walkway between two sections of the pink neon building
illuminated entrance to the Eden Plaza visible at the end of the corridor
sunken area filled with rubble and structural damage visible to the right

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow corridor formed by the pink neon building walls. The Eden Plaza entrance glows at the far end of the passage. Midway through, the camera turns to reveal a lower ruined area filled with debris to the right. The enclosed space creates a more intimate, sheltered atmosphere compared to the open street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated overlook of a sunken plaza into a narrow, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins along a railing overlooking a pit of wrecked vehicles, with the glowing Eden Plaza sign and a massive pink building framing the damp, overcast atmosphere. As the camera turns toward the walkway, it passes conversing civilians and Tyger Claws gang members in red armor before descending to street level. The scene then shifts to a path lined with debris and abandoned cars, moving closer to the looming pink architecture and a prominent overpass structure. Finally, the camera enters a sheltered passage formed by the building walls, glancing toward a ruined lower area to the right before facing the glowing entrance of Eden Plaza at the end of the corridor.
